chat.title: JM — AI Construction Assistant
chat.emptyDesc: Your AI expert in Swiss construction. SIA standards, CFC codes, all trades — ask me your professional questions.
chat.suggestQ1: What are the client's obligations according to SIA 118?
chat.suggestQ2: How is the CFC code structured for a residential building?
chat.suggestQ3: What are the warranty periods under SIA 118 art. 172?
chat.suggestQ4: What is the difference between SIA 102 and SIA 103?
chat.suggestQ5: How to calculate architect fees according to SIA 102?
chat.suggestQ6: What are the project phases according to SIA 112?
chat.suggestQ7: What documents are required for a building permit in Switzerland?
chat.suggestQ8: How to handle a change order under SIA 118?
chat.suggestQ9: What are the SIA standards for thermal insulation?
chat.suggestQ10: How to organize an effective site meeting?
chat.suggestQ11: What are the main CFC items for structural work?
chat.suggestQ12: How to write a compliant site meeting report?
chat.suggestQ13: What are the responsibilities of the construction manager?
chat.suggestQ14: How to handle a defect found during project handover?
chat.suggestQ15: What is the structure of a cost estimate using CFC codes?
chat.deleteDescription: This action cannot be undone. The conversation will be permanently deleted.

problem.pain1Desc: You lose 2h per day sorting emails across 5 projects. Outlook cannot classify by site.
problem.pain2Desc: Price requests go without follow-up, reminders forgotten, comparison on Excel.
problem.pain3Desc: Field reports are on paper, hours entered 3 times, management flies blind.
problem.sol1: AI classifies your emails by project in real time
problem.sol2: Submissions are analyzed and prices requested in 4 clicks
problem.sol3: The Gantt schedule is AI-generated from your submissions
problem.sol4: Site managers enter reports on mobile

features.label: Complete platform
features.title: 12 modules, one platform
features.desc: Everything you need to manage your sites, nothing superfluous.
features.f1Desc: Sync Outlook or Gmail. AI classifies each email by project, detects urgencies and suggests replies.
features.f2Desc: Upload your Excel or PDF specifications. AI extracts items and a wizard guides your price requests.
features.f3Desc: Generate a complete schedule from your submissions. A3 PDF export, public link sharing.
features.f4Desc: Your site managers enter hours, machines and delivery notes on their phones.
features.f5Desc: Ask questions, upload plans or documents. AI analyzes and advises you in real time.
features.f6Desc: Invoiced amount, purchase costs, margin, hours per thousand CHF. The complete financial view.

spotlight.title: Cross-project pricing intelligence
spotlight.subtitle: Every bid from every project feeds your price database. The more you use Cantaia, the smarter it gets.
spotlight.col1Desc: Concrete is 12% more expensive on your new project than the previous one? Cantaia alerts you.
spotlight.col2Desc: When you import new specifications, prices are pre-filled from your history.
spotlight.col3Desc: The more projects you have, the richer your price database. An advantage impossible to replicate.
spotlight.pvTitle: Record the meeting. Minutes ready in 5 minutes.
spotlight.pvSubtitle: No more note-taking during meetings. CANTAIA transcribes, identifies decisions and actions, and sends structured minutes to participants.
spotlight.pvBullet2: SIA structure with decisions and actions
spotlight.pvBullet3: Sent to participants in one click

proof.title: Built by and for construction project managers
proof.card1Desc: CFC codes, SIA standards, multilingual FR/DE/EN, prices in CHF.
proof.card2Desc: Developed by a project manager handling 5+ simultaneous projects. Every feature solves a real problem.
proof.card3Desc: European hosting. End-to-end encryption. GDPR and Swiss law compliant.

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.a1: Your data is hosted in Europe on certified servers. We comply with GDPR and the Swiss Federal Data Protection Act (FADP).
faq.a2: Cantaia integrates with Microsoft 365 (Outlook), Gmail / Google Workspace, and any IMAP/SMTP server (Infomaniak, Hostpoint, OVH, Bluewin, etc.). Setup takes just a few clicks.
faq.a3: The interface is available in French, German and English. The AI understands all three languages for email analysis and minutes generation.
faq.a4: 5 minutes. Create your account, connect your email (Outlook, Gmail or IMAP), and the AI immediately starts classifying your emails.
faq.a5: You choose a suitable plan or your account switches to read-only mode. No data is deleted.
faq.q6: Can I use Cantaia on mobile?
faq.a6: Yes, the web application is fully responsive and works on all devices. A dedicated mobile app is planned.
faq.a7: Record your meeting (audio from the app), AI transcribes and generates structured minutes with decisions, tasks and owners.
faq.a8: Absolutely. Your emails are never stored in plain text. Only metadata necessary for classification is analyzed.
faq.a9: Every bid received feeds your price database. AI cross-references data across your projects to detect discrepancies and overcharging.
faq.a10: No. Cantaia complements your ERP. It focuses on the project manager's daily productivity, not accounting.
faq.q11: Can I import my contacts and suppliers?
faq.a11: Yes, you can import contacts from a CSV file. The directory also enriches automatically from your emails.
faq.a12: Scoring takes into account response rate, price competitiveness, delivery reliability and your team's evaluations.

cgv.title: Terms and Conditions
cgv.scopeContent: These terms and conditions govern the use of the Cantaia platform, a software-as-a-service (SaaS) solution for construction project managers in Switzerland. Accessing and using the platform implies unconditional acceptance of these terms.
cgv.subscriptionsContent: Cantaia offers three subscription plans: Starter, Pro, and Enterprise. Features included in each plan are detailed on the Pricing page. Subscriptions are for an indefinite period with monthly or annual billing as chosen by the customer.
cgv.paymentContent: Payment is made by credit card through our secure payment provider Stripe. Invoices are issued monthly or annually depending on the chosen plan. Any started month is due. Prices are indicated in CHF excluding VAT.
cgv.terminationContent: The customer may cancel their subscription at any time from their management portal. Cancellation takes effect at the end of the current billing period. Customer data is retained for 30 days after cancellation, then permanently deleted.
cgv.liabilityContent: Cantaia commits to providing 99.9% service availability (excluding scheduled maintenance). Under no circumstances shall Cantaia be liable for indirect damages resulting from the use of the platform. Artificial intelligence provides suggestions and does not replace the professional judgment of the user.
cgv.jurisdictionContent: These terms are governed by Swiss law. Any dispute relating to the interpretation or execution of these terms shall be submitted to the competent courts of the Canton of Geneva, Switzerland.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.dataCollectionContent: We collect data necessary for the operation of the service: name, surname, professional email address, company name, construction project data, emails synchronized from Outlook (with your consent), audio recordings of site visits, and meeting minutes.
privacy.dataUsageContent: Your data is used exclusively to provide Cantaia features: email classification, report generation, task creation, pricing intelligence, and daily briefings. We never use your data for advertising purposes or resale to third parties.
privacy.dataStorageContent: All data is hosted in Switzerland through our partner Supabase (Swiss cloud infrastructure). Audio recordings are stored temporarily (7 days by default) then automatically deleted after transcription. Data is encrypted in transit (TLS 1.3) and at rest (AES-256).
privacy.thirdPartiesContent: We use the following subprocessors: Supabase (hosting), Anthropic Claude (artificial intelligence), OpenAI Whisper (audio transcription), Stripe (payments), Microsoft Graph API (Outlook synchronization). Each subprocessor is subject to strict contractual obligations regarding data protection.
privacy.rightsContent: In accordance with GDPR and the Swiss DPA, you have the right to access, rectify, delete, and port your personal data. You can exercise these rights at any time by contacting us by email or from your management portal.
privacy.contactContent: For any questions regarding the protection of your personal data, you can contact us at: privacy@cantaia.io

mentions.title: Legal Notice
mentions.editorContent: Cantaia is published by [Company Name], registered in the Commercial Register of the Canton of Geneva. Registered office: Geneva, Switzerland. Contact: contact@cantaia.io
mentions.hostingContent: The website and application are hosted by Vercel Inc. (San Francisco, CA, USA) for the front-end and Supabase (Swiss infrastructure) for data storage. All user data is stored exclusively on servers located in Switzerland.
mentions.intellectualContent: All content on the Cantaia platform (texts, images, logos, interfaces, source code) is protected by copyright and intellectual property law. Any reproduction, even partial, without prior written authorization is prohibited.
mentions.creditsContent: Icons: Lucide Icons (MIT license). Typography: Plus Jakarta Sans (Google Fonts, OFL license). Illustrations and mockups: original Cantaia creations.
